description_long: This is a multi-story urban pub with a white and gray exterior, accented by black trim and red highlights above the ground floor windows and entrance. The building features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofing, with several chimneys and a variety of window shapes and sizes, including rectangular and arched forms. The ground floor facade is adorned with a prominent pub sign and decorative molding, while the upper floors have a more subdued, residential appearance. The rear and one side of the building are plain, with minimal windows and a rough, unpainted texture, suggesting it is attached to neighboring structures. A hanging sign and a wall-mounted sign are visible, adding to the establishment's character. The overall design hints at a late Victorian or Edwardian architectural influence, common in historic British urban environments.
description: A multi-story, white and gray urban pub with black trim, red highlights, decorative signage, and a mix of window styles, reflecting a historic British architectural style.
description_view_0: Narrow side view showing white facade, black-trimmed windows, and a partial view of the main entrance and signage.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance, large ground-floor windows, decorative red and black trim, and multiple chimneys on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a wall-mounted sign, fewer windows, and visible service areas or extensions at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, unpainted wall, minimal windows, and attached structures, indicating the building's integration into a row of urban buildings.
attribute_signage: There is a large, wall-mounted rectangular sign above the main entrance on the front facade, featuring the pub's name in bold letters with decorative trim. Additionally, a hanging sign with an ornate frame is visible on the side wall, displaying the word 'Owl' in a classic serif font.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located on the front facade, consisting of a single, wide door with a rounded arch above, flanked by large windows. The entrance is highlighted by red and black decorative trim and molding, with signage above. The door appears to be made of wood with glass panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front and side facades, with large rectangular windows on the ground floor and smaller, black-trimmed rectangular and arched windows on the upper floors. The rear and one side have minimal or no windows, emphasizing the building's urban, attached nature.
attribute_architectural_style: Victorian/Edwardian urban style, characterized by decorative trim, arched windows, prominent signage, and a mix of brick and plaster surfaces.
